name: Birdeye Social
description:
Birdeye is known for its local marketing solutions. With their social expansion, they’re hoping to brand themselves as an all-in-one online presence tool. While the tool is still getting there, it’s still a great addition to anyone’s tech stack - especially if you’re already using their local products! Here are the deets:

  • With custom pricing, Birdeye is targeting agencies and enterprises. Because of the pick-and-choose nature of this pricing model, it’s not the best for small businesses or freelancers with a limited budget.
  • Powered by AI, Birdeye Social helps you create posts to delight and engage your followers
  • Crosspost to local platforms like your Google Business Profile page
  • Post to Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Pinterest, LinkedIn, and Google

Key features:

✅ Multi-location management

✅ AI-assisted post creation

✅ Social inbox
what_people_say:
What people say :

Birdeye’s social tool is short and sweet. It’s still new, but with helpful features like the AI-generated posts and helpful post views, it’s a wonderful tool for multi-location businesses looking for an integrated social platform. 

Here’s what people say:

"Birdeye Social's AI features are impressive, but the reporting could be more detailed. The calendar view is a handy tool."
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Lackluster reporting
  • 🚫 Multi-brand management
